title: KOHLBURG Cable Lock 10 Meters / 400” Long - Steel Cable 10 m for Bicycle with Hook and Loop Fasteners - Steel Cable 1000 cm metres for Garden Furniture & as Bike Lock - with Easy Locking-Mechanism
features: WITH A VERY LIGHT LOCK – the steel cable is fitted with a matching padlock made of particularly light and robust aluminium steel; the lock shackle is made of hardened steel and has a diameter of 9 mm including a protective encasing
SIMPLE LOCKING MECHANISM – easy locking without a key by just pressing the shackle; practical in the dark or in the winter with gloves

10-METER-LONG FOR AN EASY CONNECTION – the safety cable has a length of 10m / 1000cm / 400”, which allows you to conveniently secure your garden tools, sports equipment or to use it as a pram lock; cable diameter including protective encasing 12 mm

INCLUDING 2 HOOK AND LOOP FASTENERS – with 2 practical hook and loop fasteners to make it easy to roll up; for bicycles, boats, baby pushchairs, scooters, motor scooter, bicycle trailer, moped & motorbikes

IMPORTANT: PROTECTIVE DUST CAP – thanks to the dust cap no dust or dirt can enter the cylinder, which prevents the lock from getting stuck and jamming; we also offer the KOHLBURG lock in a 2-meter version
description: Product Description Long and robust - The Kohlburg cable lock type Athens protects your property indoors and outdoors. No limits when locking The high-quality cable lock is 10 metres long. This length allows you to easily connect all your items. In addition, the cable has 2 practical Velcro fasteners to facilitate the folding of the lock. Click and close - a practical locking mechanism The included lock can be easily closed by pushing. You do not need a key. This saves time and makes it easier to complete it especially in cold or dark. Dust protection against clamps Thanks to the flexible dust cover, dirt and moisture are kept out of the cylinder. This prevents the lock from hooking and clamping in the long term. The Kohlburg cable lock type Athens at a glance: 10 metres long black cable - lock and cable can be used separately Total weight: 2.5 kg - including 3 keys 12 mm cable thickness including protective coating Hardened steel lock shackle with protective cover 9 mm thick Lock body made of robust but lightweight aluminium steel Outer cable eyelet width: 5 cm // Inner eyelet size (length x width): 6.5 x 2.7 cm Efficient dirt protection of the cylinder thanks to the integrated dust cap With 2 Velcro fasteners for easy folding Click mechanism allows closing without a key The cable lock is also available in 2 metres and 5 metres

specifications_table.Material: ‎Stainless Steel Stainless steel Cable covered with soft protective case
specifications_table.Special Features: ‎10 metre cable lock with dust cap, With Velcro straps for quick folding of the cable
